# Hermes Adversarial DPO Dataset

**Automatically generated preference data from adversarial multi-agent debate.**

This dataset contains 451 DPO (Direct Preference Optimization) training pairs generated by [Hermes Ouroboros](https://hermes-ouroboros.online) — a self-improving adversarial intelligence engine powered by NousResearch Hermes.

## How This Data Was Generated

Unlike hand-labeled preference datasets, these pairs are **automatically extracted from structured debate**:

1. A user query enters the system
2. **Five adversarial agents** (Advocate, Skeptic, Oracle, Contrarian, Arbiter) debate the query in parallel
3. Agents see each other's responses and **rebut in Round 2**
4. The **Arbiter** synthesizes all perspectives into a Bayesian verdict with a confidence score
5. Agent responses **aligned with the verdict** become `chosen`; **overruled responses** become `rejected`

No human labeling. The debate structure itself generates the preference signal.

## Key Insight

> The debate IS the preference data.

When the Arbiter picks a winner based on evidence quality, the aligned agent responses are demonstrably more rigorous than the overruled ones — they survived adversarial scrutiny.

## Dataset Format

Standard DPO/RLHF format (JSONL):

```json
{
  "prompt": "Is proof-of-stake more secure than proof-of-work?",
  "chosen": "[High-quality, evidence-backed response that survived adversarial debate]",
  "rejected": "[Response that was overruled during multi-agent deliberation]"
}
```

## Statistics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total DPO pairs | 451 |
| Source sessions | 110 |
| Pairs per session | 4.1 avg |
| Generation model | NousResearch Hermes-4-70B |
| Fine-tuning base | NousResearch/Hermes-3-Llama-3.1-8B |
| Training iterations | 5 (loss: 4.096 → 2.657, -35%) |

## Intended Use

- DPO/RLHF training for reasoning and analysis tasks
- Research into automated preference data generation
- Studying multi-agent debate dynamics
- Fine-tuning models for structured argumentation

## Training Results

Five self-improvement loops using this data on Hermes-3-Llama-3.1-8B (LoRA r=16):

| Version | Training Loss | Method |
|---------|--------------|--------|
| v1 | 4.096 | SFT |
| v2 | 4.093 | SFT |
| v3 | 3.214 | SFT |
| v4 | 3.281 | SFT |
| v5 | **2.657** | SFT |

## Source

Generated by [Hermes Ouroboros](https://hermes-ouroboros.online) — an adversarial intelligence engine built for the NousResearch hackathon.

- Live demo: [hermes-ouroboros.online](https://hermes-ouroboros.online)
